questions.q: Which major Canadian economic institution released the February 2026 jobs report?
Prime Minister Mark Carney announced from Norway today that Canada will maintain sanctions on which specific Russian asset, despite a temporary 30-day pause by the U.S.?
The FBI revealed today that the suspect in the Michigan synagogue attack was motivated by a 'targeted act of violence' after losing relatives in an airstrike in which country?
At the 2026 Winter Paralympics today, Natalie Wilkie won her 11th career medal (gold) in which event, becoming the second most decorated Canadian female Winter Paralympian ever?
The CRTC issued a decision today (Telecom Decision 2026-43) that officially prohibits telecommunications companies from charging fees for which consumer action?
options: Activating, changing, or cancelling a service plan
